note: Two-level decision tree on the same 11 ProDaBi food cards as WS5 (data/prodabi_food_cards.csv, N=11). OCR captures 13 fields (WS6_B1–B13). The dataset and each card's tavsiye edilebilir/edilemez label are fixed; the student's features, thresholds, and tree shape are free within rubric constraints. Full credit requires valid notation, complementary operator pairs on both splits (≤↔>, <↔≥, ≥↔<, >↔≤), çift seviyeli structure (root + inner split on evet branch), two different features, and all required leaves labeled. MCR is computed over the student's tree but need not be minimal or >0. example_answer values are illustrative Sample_Student fixtures, not required answers.

scoring_model.authority: ws6_validation.py — build_ws6_tree() + compute_tree_mcr() walk the student's tree over prodabi cards
scoring_model.mcr_policy: MCR = errors/11 is diagnostic; MCR=0 with a valid two-level tree is not penalized

threshold_notation.required_format: B2/B7: operatör + sayı with feature from B1/B6 (ör. ≤ 10, < 5); or full özellik + operatör + sayı
threshold_notation.ocr_normalization: Unicode ≤≥ and comma decimals normalized before parse

operator_rules.required: Complementary pairs on each split: evet threshold op (B2/B7) must pair with hayır label op (B4/B9): ≤↔>, <↔≥, ≥↔<, >↔≤.
operator_rules.invalid: Mismatched pair (e.g. B2: < 10 with B4: hayır (> 10) instead of ≥ 10) — partial on threshold/labels; tree_structure.operators false if cards unclassified.

credit_levels.full: Parseable operator + value on B2/B7 consistent with paired feature; complementary op on B4/B9 when both present.
credit_levels.partial: Value and feature present but operator missing, or hayır label op does not complement evet op.

credit_levels.full: Both evet and hayır branch labels present; hayır op complements evet/B2 (or B7).
credit_levels.partial: Only one branch labeled, or complementary operator mismatch between evet and hayır.

credit_levels.full: All required leaf slots for tree shape labeled with tavsiye edilir/edilemez (or accepted aliases).
credit_levels.partial: One required leaf missing or unparseable.
credit_levels.zero: Two or more required leaves missing.

credit_levels.full: All four components: çift seviyeli (inner split), two different features, required leaves labeled, complementary operators classify all 11 cards.

tree_validity.mcr_note: MCR=0 with two levels is not penalized; extra depth beyond minimum is acceptable.

components.idea: valid food feature from dataset (şeker, yağ, enerji, protein, karbonhidrat, tuz, …)

WS6_root_feature.example_note: Illustrative only — any acceptable feature is valid.

components.idea: threshold operator on evet branch (B2); must pair with complementary op on B4 hayır label
numeric threshold value consistent with root feature (B1)

WS6_root_threshold.example_note: Illustrative only — any valid operator+value for B1 feature.

components.idea: evet branch labeled with operator consistent with B2, e.g. evet (≤ 10) or evet (< 10)
hayır branch labeled with complementary operator to B2: ≤↔>, <↔≥, e.g. hayır (> 10) or hayır (≥ 10)

WS6_root_labels.example_note: Operators on B4 must complement B2, not copy a fixed answer.

components.idea: valid food feature different from root (must differ from WS6_B1)

WS6_inner_feature.example_note: Illustrative only — must differ from B1.

components.idea: threshold operator on inner evet branch (B7); must pair with complementary op on B9
numeric threshold value consistent with inner feature (B6)

WS6_inner_threshold.example_note: Illustrative only — any valid operator+value for B6 feature.

components.idea: evet branch labeled with operator consistent with B7, e.g. evet (≤ 5)
hayır branch labeled with complementary operator to B7, e.g. hayır (> 5) or hayır (≥ 5)

WS6_inner_labels.example_note: Operators on B9 must complement B7.

components.idea: recommended labels on positive paths (tavsiye edilir / edilebilir)
not-recommended labels on negative paths (tavsiye edilmez / edilemez)
required leaf nodes for this tree shape are labeled (B10+B11+B13 when inner split present; B5+B13 otherwise)

WS6_leaves.example_answer: B10: Tavsiye edilir | B11: Tavsiye edilmez | B13: Tavsiye edilmez
WS6_leaves.example_note: Required slots depend on tree shape; label text must be valid tavsiye edilir/edilemez forms.

components.idea: çift seviyeli — root split plus inner split on evet branch (depth ≥ 2)
at least 2 different features used across the tree
all required leaf nodes have class labels for this tree shape
complementary operator pairs on both splits (≤↔>, <↔≥, …); all 11 cards classified (unclassified = 0)

WS6_tree_structure.mcr_note: MCR=0 with two levels is not penalized; extra split beyond minimum is acceptable.
WS6_tree_structure.example_answer: Root şeker ≤ 10; left subtree yağ ≤ 5; all leaves labeled; MCR may be 0 or >0.
WS6_tree_structure.example_note: Holistic check — many valid trees; not compared to a single reference tree.
